name: Feature request

## Title

Give the feature a short, clear title.

## Problem Description

What problem does this feature solve for Daemon users or contributors?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior, UI, API, or developer workflow you want to add.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any other approaches you considered and why this one is better.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, related issues, or references if useful.
